items.quote: It is good to have an end to journey toward; but it is the journey that matters, in the end.
items.author: Ursula K. Le Guin

items.quote: If you want to fly, you have to give up the things that weigh you down.
items.author: Toni Morrison

items.quote: Tell me, what is it you plan to do with your one wild and precious life?
items.author: Mary Oliver

items.quote: All that you touch you change. All that you change changes you.
items.author: Octavia E. Butler

items.quote: Life shrinks or expands in proportion to one's courage.
items.author: Anais Nin
